title: Concentra (CON) Q2 Revenue Jumps 15%
author: Jesterai
description: Concentra Group Parent reported Q2 2025 revenue of $550.8 million, a 15.2% year-over-year increase, driven by acquisitions and organic growth. Despite beating revenue estimates, earnings per share missed expectations, and profitability was pressured by higher expenses.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mixed financial performance with strong revenue growth (15.2%) offset by lower earnings per share, rising expenses, and margin pressures. Management raised full-year guidance, indicating confidence in future performance.

title: Select Medical Holdings Corporation Announces Declaration of a Special Stock Distribution to Spin-Off Concentra
author: Prnewswire
description: Select Medical Holdings Corporation announced a special stock distribution to spin-off its Concentra subsidiary, which is the largest provider of occupational health services in the United States.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is taking a strategic action to spin-off its Concentra subsidiary, which suggests a focus on streamlining its business and potentially unlocking value for shareholders.

Concentra is being spun-off as the largest provider of occupational health services in the United States, indicating it is a strong and valuable business unit within Select Medical Holdings Corporation.

title: Stocks Slip As Oil Prices Climb, 10-Year Yields Cross 4%; Energy Sector Outperforms: What's Driving Markets Monday?
author: Piero Cingari, Benzinga Staff Writer
description: Stocks opened lower as geopolitical tensions in the Middle East escalated, driving up oil prices and Treasury yields. The energy sector outperformed, while other sectors declined. Concerns over potential Israeli retaliation against Iran and the ongoing war in Gaza weighed on the market.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The iShares 20+ Year Treasury Bond ETF (TLT) fell 0.6% as investors became increasingly wary of long-duration bonds due to rising 10-year Treasury yields.

Super Micro Computer Inc. (SMCI) rallied 14% after the company announced it is currently shipping more than 100,000 graphics processors per quarter and unveiled a new suite of liquid cooling products.
Everest Group Ltd. (EG) plummeted over 8% after Morgan Stanley lowered its price target.
Constellation Brands Inc. (STZ) fell nearly 2% after Bank of America downgraded the stock from Outperform to Neutral and lowered the price target.
Concentra Group Holding Parent Inc. (CON) fell 4.6% after Bank of America downgraded several healthcare stocks.
AMN Healthcare Services Inc. (AMN) fell 1.9% after Bank of America downgraded several healthcare stocks.
Brookdale Senior Living (BKD) fell 6% after Bank of America downgraded several healthcare stocks.
